name: outreach-rsvp-confirmation
subject: You're confirmed: {{event_name}} on {{event_date}}
html_content:
Aloha {{first_name}},

Your RSVP for {{event_name}} on {{event_date}} at {{event_location}} is confirmed. We will email a reminder the day before.

Mahalo,
Angela Peterson
Pacific Reef Research Institute Outreach

name: outreach-event-reminder
subject: Reminder: {{event_name}} tomorrow at {{event_time}}
html_content: Aloha {{first_name}}, this is your reminder for {{event_name}} tomorrow at {{event_time}}. Location: {{event_location}}. See you there.

name: outreach-event-recap
subject: Recap: {{event_name}}
html_content: Aloha {{first_name}}, thanks for joining {{event_name}}. The slides and photo set are linked below. Mahalo for being part of the reef community.

name: outreach-quarterly-newsletter
subject: Reef notes — {{month}} {{year}}
html_content:
{{month}} {{year}} reef notes

{{body}}

Mahalo for caring about the reef,
Angela & the outreach team

name: outreach-volunteer-call
subject: Volunteer call — {{event_name}}
html_content: Aloha {{first_name}}, we need ten volunteers for {{event_name}} on {{event_date}}. Reply to claim a slot.

name: outreach-donor-thank-you
subject: Mahalo for your support
html_content: Aloha {{first_name}}, mahalo for your {{amount}} gift to the Coastal Conservation Fund Phase III project. Your tax receipt is attached.

name: outreach-educator-welcome
subject: Welcome to the reef-curriculum educator cohort
html_content: Aloha {{first_name}}, welcome to the K-12 reef-curriculum cohort. Your Classroom invite is on its way; the educator kit ships next week.

name: outreach-post-event-survey
subject: Two-minute survey: {{event_name}}
html_content: Aloha {{first_name}}, can you spare two minutes to tell us what worked at {{event_name}}? Survey link below.
